text: in 2017 Alex downloaded Tinder for the first time in his life because he' never had much success with woman and he didn't consider himself too attractive he figured he might as well try his luck with dating apps as is often the case for average looking guys in online dating Alex initially didn't get a lot of attention from the kind of girls he wanted to meet up with but things took a turn
